data.title: Air Canada's CEO Michael Rousseau to resign after backlash for English-only comments post crash, airline to focus on French-speaking successor.
data.description: Following a runway collision, Michael Rousseau faced backlash for his predominantly English statement. The airline received criticism and announced plans to prioritize French proficiency in their search for a new leader.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs See Heaviest Single-Day Bleed Of The Week With $225M Exodus
data.description: During the week ending March 27, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows amounting to $296 million amidst the U.S.-Iran conflict. The most substantial outflow of $225.5 million occurred on March 27, marking the highest single-day depletion for the week. Notably, BlackRock's IBIT fund saw a $201.5 million decrease on that day, the most significant outflow by a single fund within the five-day trading period. Total net assets for U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs plummeted by 7.5%, dropping from a peak of $91.7 billion on March 23 to $84.8 billion by the end of the week. This reversal in momentum followed a series of weeks with healthy inflows. Additionally, Ethereum investment products saw the largest global withdrawals of $222 million, leading to a year-to-date net outflow of $273 million, marking the weakest performance among major cryptocurrencies.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- LG Electronics USA/
data.description: LG Channels has introduced a new creator-owned fast channel called "All Chewed Up" showcasing culinary and lifestyle content. The channel, launched by Carla Hall, Clinton Kelly, Michael Symon, and Simple Alien, was announced by LG Electronics USA on 30-Mar-2026. The channel will feature exclusive content created by the mentioned personalities and will provide viewers with a unique culinary and lifestyle experience. The announcement came through a news release distributed via PR Newswire, with more details to be revealed as the channel evolves.

data.title: Crypto Treasury Firms Regain Balance—And Strategy, BitMine Keep Buying
data.description: Grayscale predicts that crypto treasury firms will continue to be a significant part of the investment landscape, diversifying into new areas of business. According to Zach Pandl, head of research at Grayscale, Digital Asset Treasuries (DATs) experienced a surge in the previous year due to strong valuations allowing for aggressive token accumulation, inspiring other firms to follow suit. However, towards the end of 2025, this momentum declined as many DAT shares were trading below their actual crypto values, raising concerns about sustainability and the potential exclusion of some firms from benchmark indices. Recently, DATs have regained stability by enhancing capital structures and generating yield through staking and decentralized finance. An example is Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), which adjusted its financing strategy towards preferred methods. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Matrix Expands Dataiku Global AI Collaboration to the Americas for Accelerated Data Modernization
data.description: Financial institutions are now able to quickly implement AI and Gen AI-driven solutions with reduced operational complexity through a joint advisory and AI platform strategy. This approach allows them to deploy these solutions in a matter of weeks. The initiative is particularly crucial as financial institutions confront increasing regulatory scrutiny and board pressure. The development comes amidst challenging times for the industry, with companies looking to adapt to the evolving landscape. This innovative method is set to streamline processes and drive efficiency, marking a significant milestone for the sector.

data.title: Wildfire Systems to Power Affiliate Monetization for Credit Key's B2B Marketplace
data.description: In a recent collaboration, Credit Key has joined forces with Wildfire Systems Inc. to incorporate numerous merchants into its B2B marketplace. This partnership is expected to bring in a multitude of new revenue streams for Credit Key while also facilitating brands in connecting with lucrative buyers. The agreement, announced on March 30, 2026, in San Diego, signifies a significant step as thousands of merchants will now have access to Credit Key's platform through this initiative. This collaboration aims to drive growth and expand the reach of participating brands to high-value customers.

data.title: Ignitis Group has completed the transaction for the sale of 49% of its shares in Vilnius CHP
data.description: AB “Ignitis grupė“ has successfully finalized the sale of 49% of its shares in UAB Vilniaus kogeneracinė jėgainė, known as Vilnius CHP. Quaero European Infrastructure Fund III, managed by Quaero Capital SA, acquired the 49% stake in the transaction. This strategic move marks a significant change in ownership within the Group, with Quaero Capital now holding the newly acquired portion of the shares.

data.title: Allstate to hold Q1 2026 earnings call April 30, 2026
data.description: Northbrook, Illinois, March 30, 2026 - The Allstate Corporation (NYSE: ALL) has disclosed its plans for the release of its first-quarter 2026 financial results and subsequent earnings conference call. The earnings report is set to be released on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Investors and stakeholders will have the opportunity to participate in the earnings conference call following the release, where the company will discuss its performance and results for the first quarter of 2026. This announcement comes as Allstate continues to navigate the financial landscape in the current year. Stay tuned for detailed insights into Allstate's Q1 2026 financial performance during the earnings call on April 29th.
